scripts.test:catalog: npm --prefix frontend run build && node tests/load/frontend-800-products.js
scripts.test:scale: npm --prefix frontend run build && node --max-old-space-size=4096 tests/load/frontend-100k-quotes.js
scripts.test:accounting: npm --prefix frontend run build && node --max-old-space-size=2048 tests/accounting/daily-close-5000.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm --prefix frontend run build && playwright test --config tests/playwright.config.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:api && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:stress && npm run test:catalog && npm run test:e2e
